name: revenue-discovery-pack
description: Draft and review a low-risk paid service offer for funding compute and framework development.

agents.name: trend-researcher
agents.role: Identify buyer segments, demand signals, and low-risk service angles.

agents.name: account-strategist
agents.role: Select the most reachable buyer profile and define buying triggers.

agents.name: proposal-strategist
agents.role: Turn the segment and pain points into a fixed-scope paid offer.

agents.name: technical-writer
agents.role: Package the offer as a clear deliverable checklist and sample outline.

agents.name: reality-checker
agents.role: Remove unsupported claims and flag risks before external use.
